title: Evaluate FLUX.2 Klein 4B for masked object/text removal
description: Check out FLUX.2 Klein 4B as a paint-a-mask -> remove-object/text model (the promptless-feeling Flux inpaint we want). If we pick it up, test its actual removal capabilities and decide whether it's worth wiring in. LICENSE ALREADY CLEARED: Klein 4B is Apache 2.0 (commercial OK); Klein 9B and Flux.1 Fill dev are non-commercial and ruled OUT for a paid app. Outpainting is NOT needed here - black-border + existing edit models already covers canvas-extend. Before any wiring: cheaper first test is whether Krea2 masked-edit (MPI-282) already removes on an empty/'remove' prompt. If Klein 4B proceeds it needs the ComfyUI pin bumped (newer than the 0.26 Pod pin) and the full /mpi-add-model playbook.
